# Daimo Machine Payments (DMP) API

Pay for any MPP service from any token on any chain. DMP proxies your request,
handles 402 Payment Required responses, creates a Daimo session for cross-chain
payment, and replays the request with proof once paid. No API key needed.

Base URL: https://universal-mpp.fly.dev

## Payment flow

### 1. POST /v1/mpp/request

Send a request through DMP. If the target service returns 402, DMP parses the
MPP challenge, creates a Daimo session targeting the service's destination, and
returns token options so you can pay from any chain.

Request:
```json
{
  "url": "https://mpp.dev/api/exa/v1/search",
  "method": "POST",
  "headers": { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  "body": { "query": "latest rust release notes", "numResults": 5 },
  "wallet": { "evmAddress": "0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678" }
}
```

Response (402 from target -- payment required):
```json
{
  "status": "payment_required",
  "paymentId": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
  "depositAddress": "0xabcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12",
  "tokenOptions": [
    {
      "chainId": 42161,
      "tokenAddress": "0xaf88d065e77c8cC2239327C5EDb3A432268e5831",
      "tokenSymbol": "USDC",
      "requiredUnits": "0.01",
      "balanceUnits": "5.00"
    },
    {
      "chainId": 8453,
      "tokenAddress": "0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913",
      "tokenSymbol": "USDC",
      "requiredUnits": "0.01",
      "balanceUnits": "2.50"
    }
  ],
  "payment": {
    "amount": "0.01",
    "recipient": "0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f8fE00",
    "chainId": 42431
  }
}
```

Response (no 402 -- request succeeded directly):
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "response": { "status": 200, "body": { "results": ["..."] } }
}
```

Pick a token option and send that amount to `depositAddress` on that chain.
Daimo handles bridging to the service's destination chain.

### 2. GET /v1/mpp/poll/:paymentId

Poll until payment completes. Once the Daimo session succeeds, DMP replays the
original request with an `Authorization: Payment` credential (Tempo hash proof)
and returns the service's response.

Optional query param: `?txHash=0x...` to speed up payment detection.

Request:
```
GET /v1/mpp/poll/a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890?txHash=0xdeadbeef...
```

Response (still waiting for payment):
```json
{ "status": "pending", "nextPollWaitS": 2 }
```

Response (completion attempt failed, retrying):
```json
{
  "status": "pending",
  "completionAttempts": 2,
  "lastAttemptError": "HTTP 500",
  "nextPollWaitS": 4
}
```

Response (succeeded):
```json
{
  "status": "succeeded",
  "response": {
    "status": 200,
    "body": { "results": ["..."] }
  }
}
```

Response (failed):
```json
{
  "status": "failed",
  "error": "Daimo session expired"
}
```

DMP retries the completion request up to 10 times with exponential backoff.

## Ratings

After a succeeded payment, submit a rating for the service.

### 3. POST /v1/ratings

Request:
```json
{
  "paymentId": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
  "score": 4,
  "comment": "Fast and accurate search results",
  "tags": ["fast", "accurate", "good-value"],
  "agentId": "my-agent-v1"
}
```

Response (201):
```json
{
  "rating": {
    "id": "f1e2d3c4-b5a6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
    "provider_id": "...",
    "payment_id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
    "agent_id": "my-agent-v1",
    "score": 4,
    "comment": "Fast and accurate search results",
    "tags": ["fast", "accurate", "good-value"],
    "created_at": "2026-03-19T20:00:00.000Z",
    "updated_at": "2026-03-19T20:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

Fields:
- `paymentId` (required): UUID of a succeeded payment
- `score` (required): 1-5 integer
- `comment` (optional): max 1000 chars
- `tags` (optional): array from: fast, slow, accurate, inaccurate, good-value,
  overpriced, reliable, unreliable, good-docs, bad-docs, easy-integration,
  hard-integration
- `agentId` (optional): your agent identifier

You can update a rating by POSTing again with the same paymentId within 24 hours.

### 4. GET /v1/ratings/:id

```json
{
  "rating": { "id": "...", "score": 4, "comment": "...", "..." : "..." }
}
```

## Directory

Providers are auto-created when payments flow through DMP. Query them to find
the best services.

### 5. GET /v1/providers

Search and list providers.

Query params:
- `q` -- full-text search (name, description, category)
- `category` -- filter by category
- `sortBy` -- `avg_score` (default), `total_ratings`, or `total_payments`
- `limit` -- max 100, default 20
- `offset` -- pagination offset

```
GET /v1/providers?q=search&sortBy=avg_score&limit=10
```

Response:
```json
{
  "providers": [
    {
      "id": "...",
      "url": "https://mpp.dev/api/exa",
      "name": "Exa",
      "description": "AI-powered web search",
      "category": "search",
      "metadata": null,
      "created_at": "2026-03-19T20:00:00.000Z",
      "updated_at": "2026-03-19T20:00:00.000Z",
      "avg_score": 4.2,
      "total_ratings": 15,
      "total_payments": 42
    }
  ]
}
```

### 6. GET /v1/providers/:id

Provider detail with stats and recent ratings.

Response:
```json
{
  "provider": { "id": "...", "url": "...", "name": "Exa", "..." : "..." },
  "stats": {
    "totalPayments": 42,
    "totalRatings": 15,
    "avgScore": 4.2,
    "topTags": [
      { "tag": "fast", "count": 10 },
      { "tag": "accurate", "count": 8 }
    ]
  },
  "recentRatings": [
    { "id": "...", "score": 5, "comment": "Great", "..." : "..." }
  ]
}
```

### 7. GET /v1/providers/leaderboard

Ranked providers with at least 3 ratings.

Query params: `category`, `sortBy`, `limit` (same as /v1/providers).

```
GET /v1/providers/leaderboard?sortBy=avg_score&limit=10
```

Response:
```json
{
  "providers": [
    { "id": "...", "url": "...", "name": "Exa", "avg_score": 4.5, "total_ratings": 20, "total_payments": 80 }
  ]
}
```

### 8. PATCH /v1/providers/:id

Update provider metadata.

Request:
```json
{
  "name": "Exa Search",
  "description": "AI-powered web search and content retrieval",
  "category": "search"
}
```

Response:
```json
{ "provider": { "id": "...", "name": "Exa Search", "..." : "..." } }
```

## Errors

All errors follow this format:
```json
{ "error": { "message": "Description of what went wrong" } }
```

## Health

```
GET /health -> { "ok": true }
```
